title: Coogam Magnetic Travel Tangram Puzzles Book Games IQ Educational Toys Age 3+ for Kids Adults (360 Patterns)
features: 【Challenging & Fun】Classical tangram puzzle toys come with 7 small colorful simple magnetic plates which can spell out 360 different shapes and styles patterns. The puzzle is composed of the animal, people, object, boat and geometric figure. Really fun and educational game.

【For All Ages】This is a traditional teaching mathematics in a jigsaw puzzle from easy to difficult. Both adults and children are suitable. It can help to increase the intelligence of the kids, to release the working pressure of the adults and to prevent a decline in memory of the elderly.
【Best Travel Game】The book dimension is 6.1*5.9 inches. It is small and convenient, easy to carry wherever you go.

【Eco-friendly Design】It is made of environmental protection material, no smell, non-toxic, harmless. The texture is soft which keeps your children safe. The bottom is magnetic, strong and durable, no worry about a loss of the plate.
【An Exellent Gift Idea】Perfect Christmas or Birthday Gift.
